name: Auto Edge Banding Machine

Precision gluing, trimming, and finishing for modular furniture, kitchens, and panel manufacturing.

name: Cold Press Machine
description: High-Performance Cold Press Solutions for Woodworking Industries Makewell Industries is a leading manufacturer of woodworking cold pressing machines, offering a variety of options such as 50 Ton Hydraulic Cold Press Machines, 100 Ton Cold Press Machines, and more. Our machines are designed for industrial use, providing robust performance and efficient operation in a variety of woodworking applications. Based in Ahmedabad, India, Makewell Industries has been serving the industry since 1993, delivering high-quality, reliable, and cost-effective solutions to clients worldwide. Our Cold Press Machines are known for their superior build quality, designed with hydraulic power sources for smooth, precise, and uniform pressure distribution. With options for both manual and automatic operation, these machines cater to a wide range of industrial requirements, ensuring maximum productivity and performance.
features: Capacity: 50 Ton / 100 Ton / 150 Ton
Usage/Application: Industrial (Woodworking)
Automation Grade: Automatic
Power Source: Hydraulic
Material: Mild Steel for durability and strength
Voltage: 440 V for efficient operation
Pressure: 50 Ton for optimal pressing force
Number of Cylinders: 2 for balanced performance
Product Type: Cold Press
Brand: Makewell
Country of Origin: Made in India

name: Core Dry Press Machine
description: Innovative Drying Solutions for the Wood Industry Makewell Industries, a leading manufacturer of Plywood Core Dry Press Machines, offers both 4 Cylinder Plywood Core Dry Press Machines and 2 Cylinder Plywood Core Veneer Dry Press Machines from Ahmedabad. These machines are engineered using the latest technologies and equipment, ensuring high performance and reliability in wood industry applications. Designed for efficient drying and straitening of plywood cores, our presses are equipped with high-powered cylinders and hot platens, delivering consistent, delay-free performance. Depending on your specific needs, the medium used can be steam oil or hot steam, providing versatility for various applications.
features: PLC Controlled Electrical Panel for enhanced precision and ease of operation.
User-Friendly and Maintenance-Free design for minimal downtime and long-lasting performance.
Ensures Better Straitening & Drying of the core material for superior quality output.
Equal Lifting Equipment ensures uniform pressure distribution for consistent results.
Available in 15 to 24 Daylight Options to suit different production requirements.
Size Options Available: 8' x 4', 9' x 4', 11' x 4', and 13' x 4' for flexibility in production.

name: Electric Boiler Hot Press
description: Precision Engineering for Superior Performance As a prominent manufacturer based in Ahmedabad, Makewell Industries offers the 180 Ton Electric Boiler Hot Press Machine and 320 Ton Electric Boiler Hot Press Machine, both designed to provide efficient and high-performance solutions for industrial pressing needs. These machines are ideal for use in a wide range of industries requiring electric steam boilers, ensuring consistent, reliable, and cost-effective operation. Our products include automatic electric steam boilers, diesel-fired steam boilers, and self-loading electric steam boilers, incorporating cutting-edge technology to provide seamless operation even under voltage variations. The unique pressure vessel design ensures completely dry steam, while the modular operation guarantees the perfect amount of steam without wasting energy.
features: Fabricated Structure From Tested Plates ensures durability and robustness.
Close Frame Construction for maximum rigidity in all directions, reducing deflection.
Precisely Welded & Machined for minimal deflection and long-lasting performance.
Uniform Thermal Conditions in All Daylights for consistent heating and efficient production.
Leak-Free Hydraulic Cylinders for smooth and reliable operation.
RAMS Hard Chrome Plated & Ground for micro-finish and accuracy, ensuring extended service life and durability.

name: Fiberglass Hot Press
description: High-Performance Pressing Solutions for Fiberglass Manufacturing The Fiberglass Hot Press is designed to meet the demanding requirements of fiberglass production, delivering high pressure and precise heat distribution for superior results. These presses are used in the manufacturing of fiberglass products, ensuring durable, high-quality outcomes for industries such as automotive, construction, and more. With advanced engineering and robust construction, the Fiberglass Hot Press is perfect for various applications requiring high-pressure compression, ensuring consistent performance over time.
features: High Capacity: Available in up to 2000 Tons, ensuring sufficient pressure for large-scale fiberglass manufacturing.
Precision Engineering: Designed with high-quality platens and optimized heat distribution for uniform results.
Durable Construction: Built to withstand heavy-duty operations and provide long-lasting performance.
Customizable Specifications: Multiple platen sizes and pressure options to cater to various fiberglass production needs.

name: Hydraulic Press For Hpl (High-pressure Laminate)
description: Designed for Industrial Strength and Precision The Hydraulic Press for HPL line is engineered to produce Industrial Laminates, commonly known as Hylam Sheets, which are widely used in industrial applications, including insulation boards, copper-clad PCBs, and insulator sheets. The complete Industrial Laminate Press Line by Makewell Industries consists of various machines for assembly, stripping, mold handling, loading, unloading, conveying, and press lamination, ensuring an efficient and seamless production process. With our comprehensive line of standard hydraulic presses and the ability to custom-design presses to meet specific customer requirements, we are able to serve a wide range of industries. Whether you need a standard press or a highly customized solution, Makewell Industries has the expertise to provide the best hydraulic press machine for your business.
features: Window Frame Construction for enhanced durability and robust support.
Multi Daylight Openings that accommodate different laminate sizes and requirements.
Uniform Heat and Pressure Distribution ensuring consistent and high-quality lamination.
Hydraulic and Electrical Components of International Standards for superior performance and reliability.
Push Button / PLC-Based Controls for ease of operation and automation.

name: Hydraulic Press for Waste Recycling Plastic Sheet
shortName: Hydraulic Press for Waste Recycling Plastic Sheet
description: High-Performance Pressing Solutions for Fiberglass Manufacturing Plastic waste has emerged as one of the most pressing environmental concerns, particularly in industries such as paper mills, which generate significant amounts of residual plastic waste. In response to this challenge, Makewell Industries introduces its Plastic Waste Recycling Plant, designed to help paper mills and other industries efficiently convert plastic waste into innovative and sustainable products. Our plant is equipped with cutting-edge technology to ensure optimal recycling efficiency, transforming plastic waste into useful materials while contributing to environmental sustainability.
features: Converts plastic waste into reusable sheets and products
Designed for paper mills and industrial plastic waste streams
Supports sustainable recycling with hydraulic pressing technology

name: Metal Door Press Machine
description: At Makewell Industries, we specialize in delivering industrial-grade machinery engineered for performance, durability, and efficiency. Our Metal Door Press Machine is purpose-built for manufacturers requiring fast, consistent, and high-pressure metal forming—especially for MS and steel door panels. Backed by advanced hydraulic systems and a rugged design, this fully automatic press is optimized for high-output environments, ensuring seamless operation, energy savings, and low maintenance needs. It's the perfect fit for metal fabrication units that demand precision and speed without compromise.
features: High-Capacity Performance: 100 Ton pressing power for superior metal door forming.
Fully Automatic Operation: Increases productivity with minimal manual intervention.
Durable Construction: Made from heavy-duty MS frame for long-term reliability.
Energy-Efficient Motor: 7.5HP motor ensures smooth operation with optimized power usage.
Precision Engineering: Accurate platen and cylinder alignment for consistent results.
Advanced Hydraulic System: Provides smooth, stable, and high-pressure operation.
Fast Cycle Time: 15-second press cycle to maximize throughput.
Large Working Area: 1300 x 2500 mm platen accommodates various door sizes.
Safety Integrated Design: Comes with necessary interlocks and protective systems.
Low Maintenance: Engineered for easy servicing and low downtime.

rows: (L x W x T) 1300 x 2500 x 40 mm

name: Pre Press Hydraulic Press
description: Optimizing Production Efficiency The Pre Press is a Hydraulic Press designed to compress materials before they enter the Hot Press, reducing production time and cost. As a Cold Press, it serves as an essential step in the production process, specifically for plywood, particle boards, MDF, and bamboo sheet presses. The Pre Press helps to prepare the material for hot pressing, ensuring a more efficient and cost-effective production line. Makewell Industries offers a complete range of standard hydraulic presses along with the capability to custom-design presses that cater to specific customer requirements. Whether your business needs a standard press or a customized solution, Makewell Industries has the expertise to provide the best hydraulic press machine for your production needs.
features: Window Frame Construction for enhanced durability and stability.
Uniform Pressure Distribution ensures even compression and high-quality output.
Hydraulic and Electrical Components of International Standards for top-tier performance and reliability.
Push Button / PLC-Based Controls for easy and efficient operation, with automation for added convenience.

name: Rubber Press
description: Our Hydraulic Hot Press Machines are engineered to provide superior performance in the production of various rubber-based products. Whether it’s for rubber conveyor belts, precured tread rubber for tyres, or cow mats, our presses offer precise control, uniform heat distribution, and consistent pressure, ensuring optimal results every time.
features: Hydraulic hot press for rubber conveyor belts

Cow mat and rubber moulding applications
Uniform heat and pressure for durable rubber products
